Part.Source:
Event Start
&EnviarEmailPDF = true &EnviarEmailExcell = False &EnviarBoletos = Status_SimNao.Nao &EnviarNotas = Status_SimNao.Nao &DestacarImpostos = Status_SimNao.Nao txtexedido.Visible = 0 Msgtt.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) waMsgtt.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Msgtt1.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) waMsgtt1.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Msgttsdsd.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0)
AvisoWhats1.ForeColor = RGB(0,150,200) AvisoWhats2.ForeColor = RGB(250,150,0) AvisoWhats3.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0)
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
&WaDtaEms = serverdate() &Ano = year(&WaDtaEms) &Mes = month(&WaDtaEms) &WaAnoMes = trim(str(&Ano)) + padL(trim(str(&mes)),2,'0') prcWhatsApp_verificaQtdEnviadaAnoMes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaAnoMesQtd, &EmpQtdWhatsMsg) if &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > &WaAnoMesQtd or &EmpQtdWhatsMsg = 0 AvisoWhats3.Visible = 0 Endif
RetornaSDTboletosPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &sdtBoleto) if &sdtBoleto.Count = 0 GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.HideTab(3) tbEnviaBoleto.Visible = 0 tbEnviaBoletoWhats.Visible = 0 EndiF
RetornaSDTNotasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod,&SdtNotaPedido) if &SdtNotaPedido.Count = 0 GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.HideTab(4) TbNotasWhats.Visible = 0 tbNotas.Visible = 0 EndiF
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where PesCod = &Context.PesCod &PesCodRaz = PesRaz &waPesCodRaz = PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesEmlCod &PesEml = PesEml &waPesEml = PesEml Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor
padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#REMETENTE_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &NovoCorpoRemetente, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#OBSAUTOMATICA_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &ObsAutomatica, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#ABASELECIONADA_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &AbaSelecionada, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if &AbaSelecionada = 'W' gxUITabsPanel_tabs1.SelectTab(2) txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 0 Else txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 0 Endif
&possuiIND_E = RetornaEmpresaModulo.Udp(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.IND_E)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable8.Height = 420 TbNotasWhats.Width = 170 UnnamedTable16.Width = 145 tbEnviaBoletoWhats.Width = 170 UnnamedTable10.Width = 145 UnnamedTable20.Height = 420 TbNotas.Width = 170 tbEnviaBoleto.Width = 170 UnnamedTable27.Width = 145 UnnamedTable25.Width = 145 &EmpCod.Visible = False GridNotas_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridNotas.InternalName GridNotas.Rows = Page.Rows &GridNotasCurrentPage = 1 &GridNotasCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridNotasPageCount = -1 Gridduplica_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Gridduplica.InternalName Gridduplica.Rows = Page.Rows Grid.Rows = 10 &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 WCwcHistoricoEnvioWhats.Object = wcHistoricoEnvioWhats.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCod, 'PEDIDO', '') GridNotasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridNotas.Rows GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
do 'LoadDados' Do 'VerificaFaltas'
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridNotasPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount
EndEvent
Event GridNotas.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Gridduplica.Load
For &sdtBoletoItem in &sdtBoleto
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &sdtBoletoItem.CreFilCod Where CreCod = &sdtBoletoItem.CreCod
If &sdtBoletoItem.IsBoleto = 1 &gridOBS = 'BOLETO' Else &gridOBS = 'DUPLICATA' EndIF
&gridCreDupNro = CreDupNro &gridCreCod = CreCod &gridCreVlrDup = CreVlrDup &gridCreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &gridCreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &gridCreVenCod = CreVenCod &gridCreBloNro = CreBloNro &gridCreCbrCod = CreCbrCod
Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Exit EndFor EndFor
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
&EmlMsg = substr(EmlMsg, 1, 100)
Do Case Case EmlSts = Status_Solicitacao.Falha EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(250,30,0)
Case EmlSts = Status_Solicitacao.Finalizada EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(0,175,0)
Otherwise EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0)
EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridNotasPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridNotasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridNotasCurrentPage -= 1 GridNotas.PreviousPage() Case GridNotasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridNotasCurrentPage += 1 GridNotas.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridNotasPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridNotasCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridNotas.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridNotasPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridNotas.Rows = GridNotasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridNotasCurrentPage = 1 GridNotas.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone1'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone1_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone1_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone2'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone2_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone2_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone3'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone3_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone3_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone4'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone4_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone4_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVisualizarAcoes1'
padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ABASELECIONADA_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, 'W', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 0 txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 1
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAtualizarInformacoes'
grid.Refresh()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVisualizarAcoes'
padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ABASELECIONADA_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, 'E', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 1 txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone1_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum1 = &PesFonNum txtad1.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone2_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum2 = &PesFonNum txtad2.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone3_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum3 = &PesFonNum txtad3.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone4_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum4 = &PesFonNum txtad4.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum1.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum1, &PesFonNum1)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum2.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum2, &PesFonNum2)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum3.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum3, &PesFonNum3)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum4.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum4, &PesFonNum4)
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_tabs.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_Tabs2.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event Enter
if GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.ActivePage = 1 //Envia Email &PadObs = iif(&EnviarEmailPDF = true, '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&EnviarEmailExcell = true, '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&DestacarImpostos = Status_SimNao.Sim, 'S', 'N') &PadObs += trim(&TipoPedido) &PadObs += iif(&EnviarBoletos = Status_SimNao.Sim, 'S', 'N')
PadraoUsuarioHora.call('G', &LoadPadrao, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
&SdtEmail.Clear() &pattern = "^((\w+([-+.']\w+)*@\w+([-.]\w+)*\.\w+([-.]\w+)*)|(\s*))$" // valid email address pattern
If not &EmlUrl1.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl1.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl1 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl2.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl2.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl2 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl3.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl3.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl3 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl4.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl4.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl4 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl5.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl5.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl5 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl6.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl6.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl6 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#REMETENTE_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &NovoCorpoRemetente, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#OBSAUTOMATICA_PEDIDOVENDA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &ObsAutomatica, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
Do CAse CAse &SdtEmail.Count <= 0 msg('Nenhum Endereço de E-Mail foi informado!')
Case &EmlAss.IsEmpty() msg('Favor preencher o assunto do E-mail!') &EmlAss.SetFocus()
Case &EnviarEmailExcell = False and &EnviarEmailPDF = FAlse msg('Selecione pelo menos um Tipo de Pedido, Excell ou PDF')
Otherwise
&IsImposto = false if &DestacarImpostos = Status_SimNao.Sim &IsImposto = true EndIF
if &EnviarBoletos = Status_SimNao.Nao &sdtBoleto.Clear() EndiF
If &EnviarFaltasPDF = Status_SIMNAO.Sim And &IsFaltas >= 1 &IsFaltasPDF = True Else &IsFaltasPDF = False //Msg('Pedido não possui faltas.') Endif GravaEnvioEmailPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 0, TipoContaEmail.Email_Comercial, &EmlAss, TipoSolicitacao.Envia_Pedido, &Context.PesCod, &Mensagem, &SdtEmail, &sdtBoleto, &EnviarNotas,&EnviarEmailExcell, &EnviarEmailPDF, &TipoPedido, &IsImposto, &IsFaltasPDF)
Return
EndCase Else //Envia Whats
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum1, &PesFonNum1) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum2, &PesFonNum2) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum3, &PesFonNum3) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum4, &PesFonNum4)
&PadObs = '1' //iif(&EnviarEmailPDF = true, '1', '0') &PadObs += '0' //iif(&EnviarEmailExcell = true, '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&waDestacarImpostos = Status_SimNao.Sim, 'S', 'N') &PadObs += trim(&waTipoPedido) &PadObs += iif(&EnviarBoletosWhats = Status_SimNao.Sim, 'S', 'N')
PadraoUsuarioHora.call('G', &LoadPadrao+'_wa', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
&WaDtaEms = serverdate() &Ano = year(&WaDtaEms) &Mes = month(&WaDtaEms) &WaAnoMes = trim(str(&Ano)) + padL(trim(str(&mes)),2,'0') &IsGerouPDF = false
&IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum1.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum1 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum2.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum2 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum3.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum3 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum4.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum4 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true Return Else txtexedido.Visible = 1 txtexedido.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif
Endif
EndEvent
Sub 'visibleBtnEnter'
btnEnter.Visible = 0 if GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.ActivePage = 1 //Envia Email if GXUITabsPanel_tabs.ActivePage = 1 btnEnter.Visible = 1 Endif Else //Envia Whats if GXUITabsPanel_Tabs2.activePage = 1 and &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > 0 if GXUITabsPanel_Tabs1.ActivePage = 2 //envia whats btnEnter.Visible = 1 Endif Endif Endif
EndSub
Sub 'GravaEnvio'
&IsPodeEnviar = false &IsJaEnviado = false &IsPrimeiraVez = false //Verificar se o numero ja foi enviado hoje prcWhatsApp_VerificaJaEnviado.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaDtaEms, &WaFonDest, &IsJaEnviado) If &IsJaEnviado = false //se nao foi enviado verificar se pode enviar
prcWhatsApp_verificaQtdEnviadaAnoMes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaAnoMesQtd, &EmpQtdWhatsMsg) if &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > &WaAnoMesQtd &IsPodeEnviar = true &IsPrimeiraVez = true Endif
Else &IsPodeEnviar = true Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true //grava envio
&WaMensagem = 'Envio de Pedido: ' + trim(Str(&PedCod)) //PREENCHER MENSAGEM prcWhatsApp_GravaEnvio.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaDtaEms, &WaFonDest, &IsPrimeiraVez, &WaMensagem, &PedCod, &FilCod, 0, 0, &Context.PesCod, &WaGUID)
if &IsGerouPDF = false //GERA O PDF DO PEDIDO RetornaCaminhoPedido.call(trim(str(&Context.PesExtCod)), &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &URLDESTINO, &UrlVirtual)
Do Case //&TipoPedido mesmo codigo do envia email. Case &waTipoPedido = '3' //PEDIDO VENDA COM LOGOMARCA RELJAS078_toFile.Call('SR', &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &Context.PesCod, &URLDESTINO, 'N', false) Case &waTipoPedido = '2' //PEDIDO VENDA COM LOGOMARCA RELJAS078_toFile.Call('', &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &Context.PesCod, &URLDESTINO, 'N', false) Case &waTipoPedido = '4' //PEDIDO VENDA COM LOGOMARCA - IMG PRODUTO RELJAS137_toFile.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &Context.PesCod, &URLDESTINO, 'N', false) Otherwise //PEDIDO SEM LOGO RELJAS002_toFile.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &URLDESTINO, 'N', false) EndCase Endif &IsGerouPDF = true
&IsFaltasPDF = iIf( &EnviarFaltasPDFWhats = Status_SIMNAO.Sim And &IsFaltas >= 1, true, false) &IsEnviarNota = iif( &EnviarNotasWhats = Status_SimNao.Sim, true, false) &IsEnviarBoletos = iif(&EnviarBoletosWhats = Status_SimNao.Sim, true, false)
//GRAVA FILA DE ENVIO prcFilaEnvioWhats_EnviaPedidoVenda.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &Context.PesCod, &URLDESTINO, &UrlVirtual, 0, &WaFonDest, &WaGUID, &IsFaltasPDF, &IsEnviarNota, &IsEnviarBoletos) //Else // &sdtRetornoWbs.Sts = 'E001' // &sdtRetornoWbs.Obs = 'Pacote de Mensagens WhatsApp atingido, para envio de Mais mensagens entre em contato com o suporte.' Endif
EndSub
Sub 'VerificaFaltas'
&IsFaltas = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, EstLoc, ProGraRefPadL Where PedQtdCan > 0 when (PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) Where PedQtd > 0 and EstQtd < PedQtd when (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.FECHADO and PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)
&IsFaltas += 1
EndFor EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'LoadDados'
&TipoPedido.Visible = 0 &SdtEmail.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
// txtNumeroPedido.Caption = trim(str(&PedCod)) // txtValorPedido.Caption = trim(toformattedString(PedVlrLiq)) &PedCliCod = PedCliCod &waFilFonNum = FilFonNum &FilFonNum = FilFonNum
&PedFatFilCod = PedFatFilCod if &PedFatFilCod.IsEmpty() &PedFatFilCod = FilCod Endif
if &PesEml.IsEmpty() &PesEml = FilEml &waPesEml = FilEml Endif
AvisoWhats1.Visible = EmpQtdWhatsMsg0800 > 0 AvisoWhats2.Visible = EmpQtdWhatsMsg.IsEmpty() or EmpQtdWhatsMsg.IsNull()
RetornaFilialFantasia.Call(EmpCod, &PedFatFiLCod, &FilRaz) // txtNomeFilial.Caption = &FilRaz if &PesCodRaz.IsEmpty() &waPesCodRaz = &FilRaz &PesCodRaz = &FilRaz Endif
&MensagemPlaca = '' if PedVeiPla.Length() = 8 &MensagemPlaca = ', PLACA: ' + trim(PedVeiPla) Endif
&varPedCod = PedCod If LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida
if LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra &LoadPadrao = 'EnvPedDevCompra' &EmlAss = trim(LctTip.EnumerationDescription()) + ' # ' + trim(toformattedString(&varPedCod)) + ' da ' + trim(&FilRaz) + &MensagemPlaca Form.Caption = 'Envio de Pedido Devolução Compra' Else &LoadPadrao = 'EnvPedSaida' &EmlAss = trim(LctTip.EnumerationDescription()) + ' # ' + trim(toformattedString(&varPedCod)) + ' da ' + trim(&FilRaz) + &MensagemPlaca Form.Caption = 'Envio de Pedido/Orçamento Venda' EndIF Else if LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoVenda &LoadPadrao = 'EnvPedDevSaida' &EmlAss = Trim(LctTip.EnumerationDescription()) + ' # ' + trim(toformattedString(&varPedCod)) + ' da ' + trim(&FilRaz) + &MensagemPlaca Form.Caption = 'Envio de Pedido Devolução Venda' Else &LoadPadrao = 'EnvPedCompra' &EmlAss = Trim(LctTip.EnumerationDescription()) + ' # ' + trim(toformattedString(&varPedCod)) + ' da ' + trim(&FilRaz) + &MensagemPlaca Form.Caption = 'Envio de Pedido/Orçamento Compra' EndIf EndIf
&TipoPedido.Visible = 1 &TipoPedido.Clear() &TipoPedido.AddItem('1', 'Pedido SEM Logomarca') &TipoPedido.AddItem('2', 'Pedido COM Logomarca') &TipoPedido.AddItem('4', 'Pedido COM Logomarca - IMG Produto') if &possuiIND_E = 'S' &TipoPedido.AddItem('3', 'Pedido COM Logomarca SANTA RITA') Endif
&waTipoPedido.Visible = 1 &waTipoPedido.Clear() &waTipoPedido.AddItem('1', 'Pedido SEM Logomarca') &waTipoPedido.AddItem('2', 'Pedido COM Logomarca') &waTipoPedido.AddItem('4', 'Pedido COM Logomarca - IMG Produto') if &possuiIND_E = 'S' &waTipoPedido.AddItem('3', 'Pedido COM Logomarca SANTA RITA') Endif
&PesRaz = PedCliRaz RetornaEmailComercial.call(EmpCod, PedCliCod, &SdtEmail) RetornaPessoaTelefones.Call(EmpCod,PedCliCod, &SDT_PessoaTelefones) Exit EndFor
PadraoUsuarioHora.call('L', &LoadPadrao, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &EnviarEmailPDF = iif(Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = '1', true, false) &EnviarEmailExcell = iif(Substr(&PadObs,2,1) = '1', true, false) &DestacarImpostos = iif(Substr(&PadObs,3,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) &TipoPedido = Substr(&PadObs,4,1) &EnviarBoletos = iif(Substr(&PadObs,5,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) Else PadraoUsuarioHora.call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &EnviarEmailPDF = iif(Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = '1', true, false) &EnviarEmailExcell = iif(Substr(&PadObs,2,1) = '1', true, false) &DestacarImpostos = iif(Substr(&PadObs,3,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) &TipoPedido = Substr(&PadObs,4,1) &EnviarBoletos = iif(Substr(&PadObs,5,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) EndIF EndIF if &TipoPedido.IsEmpty() &TipoPedido = '1' EndIF
PadraoUsuarioHora.call('L', &LoadPadrao+'_wa', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() //&EnviarEmailPDF = iif(Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = '1', true, false) //&EnviarEmailExcell = iif(Substr(&PadObs,2,1) = '1', true, false) &waDestacarImpostos = iif(Substr(&PadObs,3,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) &waTipoPedido = Substr(&PadObs,4,1) &EnviarBoletosWhats = iif(Substr(&PadObs,5,1) = 'S', Status_SimNao.Sim, Status_SimNao.Nao) EndIf
For &ItemSdtEmail in &SdtEmail Do Case Case &EmlUrl1.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl1 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl2.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl2 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl3.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl3 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl4.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl4 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl5.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl5 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl6.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl6 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Otherwise Exit EndCAse EndFor &SdtEmail.Clear()
For &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem in &SDT_PessoaTelefones if &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonWhatsPed = true Do Case CAse &PesFonNum1.IsEmpty() &PesFonNum1 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad1.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif
CAse &PesFonNum2.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum2 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad2.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif
CAse &PesFonNum3.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum2 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum3 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad3.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif
CAse &PesFonNum4.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum2 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum3 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum4 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad4.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif EndCase EndIf EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'getNumeroFone'
&PesFonNum.SetEmpty() &PesFonCon.SetEmpty()
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PedCliCod Where PesFonCod = &PesFonCod &PesFonNum = PesFonNum &PesFonCon = PesFonCon Exit EndFor
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Qtd Max. Msg WhatsApp no Mes
